response.overview: Sajano Bagan centers on the classic, emotionally charged theme of star-crossed love divided by severe socioeconomic disparity.  The story primarily follows Diti, a young woman who belongs to a highly affluent, influential, and wealthy family. She crosses paths with Zafar, a young man who comes from a very modest, lower-income background and lacks financial stability. Despite the massive gap in their wealth and social standing, the two are drawn to one another and fall deeply in love.
response.title: Sajano Bagan
